<!--
Thanks for contributing! A quick heads-up before you submit:

This repo is a publish mirror of the StarClaw monorepo. Accepted PRs are
cherry-picked into the monorepo and flow back out on the next release.
Your authorship is preserved in the squashed commit. See CONTRIBUTING.md
for the rationale.
-->

## What does this PR do?
<!-- One paragraph. Link the issue it closes. -->

Fixes #

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (users must update something)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Tests only
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Verification
<!-- How did you test this? -->

- [ ] `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] `go test -race ./...` passes
- [ ] `go build ./cmd/drone` succeeds and `./drone version` works
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests
- [ ] Docs updated (README / COMMANDS / DRONE.md.example as applicable)

## Notes for reviewers
<!-- Anything that wasn't obvious? Design alternatives you rejected? -->
